blocks.content: That night the group chat went quiet for the first time in a year.
Daisy was away. Kit sat at the computer, watched the buddy list, and didn't open a window.
good. better than from someone else
you should have told her yourself
I told you. in october. you know what you're doing right
I'm not trying to pile on. I just. you knew man.
Kit didn't answer. He looked at Daisy's name on the buddy list, typed her name into the window box, and stopped.
He changed his own away message to: not around. He wasn't sure who he was saying it to.
